# Maven Java Quickstart Project

This is a Maven-based Java quickstart project.

## Project Structure

- `src/main/java/com/example/` - Main application source code
- `src/test/java/com/example/` - Test source code
- `pom.xml` - Maven project configuration

## Building the Project

```bash
mvn clean compile
```

## Running Tests

```bash
mvn test
```

## Running the Application

```bash
mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="com.example.App"
```

## Development

- Use Maven to manage dependencies
- Follow Java naming conventions
- Add new dependencies to `pom.xml`
